name: Barcode Integrity
rules: Business-rule patterns are configurable via barcode_value_patterns in config.json
Multi-pass detection: scan at 0, 90, 180, 270 degree rotations
Deterministic selection: largest bounding box wins when multiple barcodes found
No OCR inference - barcodes are read directly via pyzbar/zxing, never guessed
Error codes from app/contracts.py are canonical - never invent new error codes
BARCODE_NOT_FOUND and INVALID_BARCODE_FORMAT are terminal rejection reasons
Barcode types are restricted to config.json barcode_types list
Never assume a barcode value - if detection fails, the file is rejected
